publishNote: Build + ./publish.sh. Bump reviewVersion + versionNote for new uploads (Teams + version history on site). Set due for first-time review. See teams-notifications-guide.txt.
commentsApiNote: Optional full URL if review page is on Webflow but API is on Netlify. Leave empty when the whole site is on Netlify.
messagingDocsNote: Populated at build from messaging-sources.json + OneDrive .docx (see scripts/sync-messaging-docs.mjs)

inProgress.title: Capabilities document
inProgress.summary: Post-demo PDF leave-behind — platform + Systems breakouts, proof, close. Draft badges still on pages.
inProgress.versionNote: First portal preview — polishing copy, client logos, and contact block before send.

reviewBrief.description: LUCI's flagship sales capability overview — six US Letter pages for prospect meetings and post-demo follow-up.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: structure, messaging, and visual direction. Not asking for final sign-off yet — still in final stages.

dueForReview.title: Field Activation Guide
dueForReview.summary: Post-go-live PDF — how each team puts LUCI to work on the floor. Organized by team, four use cases each + one task to try this week. Draft badges still on pages.
dueForReview.versionNote: First portal preview — six team sections (Marketing, Gaming & Operations, A/V & Facilities, IT, Finance, General Management), shared-strategy principle page, proof, and close.

reviewBrief.description: The LUCI Field Activation Guide — a US Letter PDF for handing to a property after go-live. It shows each team how to put LUCI to work on the floor: six team sections, each with four use cases and one task to try this week, framed by a shared floor-strategy principle and closing proof.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: messaging and whether each team's use cases ring true and actionable — anything overstated, missing, or mis-prioritized for that audience.

dueForReview.title: System architecture diagram
dueForReview.summary: Technical view for the capabilities deck — content sources in, one rack + platform as the control point, A/V endpoints out.
dueForReview.versionNote: First portal preview — labeled rack, grey control-point highlight, five sources, four controlled outputs.

reviewBrief.description: A technical architecture view for the capabilities document — content sources feed into LUCI (one standardized rack + the orchestration platform), which controls displays, video walls, lighting, and background music & paging over the existing network.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: technical accuracy of the rack components and the source/endpoint lists — anything mislabeled, missing, or out of place (esp. Mike's input on the rack).

dueForReview.title: What LUCI is (identity diagram)
dueForReview.summary: Plain-language identity graphic for the capabilities doc — LUCI (one rack + the platform software) + Systems (the embedded team).
dueForReview.versionNote: First portal preview — the orchestration platform (rack + laptop running the LUCI app) plus the embedded operation (team + gear).

reviewBrief.description: A plain-language identity graphic for the capabilities document: LUCI = the orchestration platform (one standardized rack plus the control software) + Systems = the embedded operation (the team that runs it day to day).
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: whether this clearly and accurately conveys what LUCI is at a glance — the platform-plus-team split and the 'one rack' simplicity.

approvedAssets.title: The Signal · Newsletter Hub
approvedAssets.summary: Newsletter hub — layout, featured issue, archive.
approvedAssets.note: The Signal · Issue 01 — Mike approved Jun 12, 2026

reviewBrief.description: The Signal hub is the customer-facing home for our newsletter—one stable place to find every issue as we publish.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: overall look and feel, and any design suggestions before we promote it.

approvedAssets.title: The Signal · Issue 01 (June 2026)
approvedAssets.summary: Issue 01 — tone, Ameristar story, platform, team, Inside LUCI how-to.

reviewBrief.description: Issue 01 is the first full web edition of The Signal—welcome, field story, platform preview, team, Inside LUCI how-to, and services.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: the sections with instructions, steps, or services—confirm we've explained them correctly.

approvedAssets.title: Newsletter email · The Signal Issue 01 teaser
approvedAssets.summary: Inbox teaser — Issue 01 highlights, deep links, read-issue CTA. Footer tagline synced to Messaging Guide.
approvedAssets.versionNote: Footer tagline updated to “The Orchestration Engine for Enterprise Multimedia” (Messaging Guide, Jun 9).

reviewBrief.description: Email that announces Issue 01 and drives readers to the web edition—welcome, story highlights with section links, and Mike's signature.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: copy, layout, and whether the teaser gives enough reason to open the full issue on the web.

versionHistory.note: Footer tagline synced to Messaging Guide.

approvedAssets.title: Case Study · Ameristar Council Bluffs
approvedAssets.summary: Ameristar case study — narrative, results, CTA.

reviewBrief.description: The Ameristar case study is the long-form Council Bluffs relocation and LUCI rollout story for the website, sales, and export.
reviewBrief.reviewAsk: accuracy and story—whether we represented everything correctly.
